title: thelypteris ratnapurae
intro: Thelypteris ratnapurae, also known as the Ratnapura fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris ratnapurae include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, where it is brewed in hot water to release its medicinal compounds.
